scripts.clean:release: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path release) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force release }; Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue vite-*.log,*.log,*.png"
scripts.cleanup:package: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path release/win-unpacked) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force release/win-unpacked }; Remove-Item -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue release/builder-debug.yml"
scripts.prepare:open-source: node --check tools/audit-open-source.cjs && node --check electron/main.cjs && node --check electron/preload.cjs && node --check electron/catalog-service.cjs && node --check electron/character-service.cjs && npm run build && npm run clean:dist && npm run audit:open-source
scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && vite build
scripts.package:win: npm run clean:release && npm run build && electron-builder --win portable && npm run cleanup:package
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:sync && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Push-Location android; .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; Pop-Location; exit $code"
